Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I don't think we're gonna get to eat together like this anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}To be honest, something's been on my mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 10 25 25}I saw a magazine in Emiri's room. Guess what it was called.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Why would I have a problem with that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It was a wedding magazine! So it got me thinking...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Dude, I wouldn't be going out with her if she was into that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It was a wedding magazine! So it got me thinking...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}When I saw that magazine, it got me thinking...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And I've made up my mind, man. As soon as I graduate high school, I'm gonna marry Emiri.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm not rushing things! I'm gonna marry her eventually, so what's the difference!? Why should I wait!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Hey, you think I'm joking, don't you? Look at me, dude! I'm serious![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I'm seriously in love with Emiri, and I'm gonna marry her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Then Emiri Kanou will be known as Emiri Tomochika! And I'll make her the happiest wife ever![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika seems dead set on this plan.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}We should get going. I wonder how many more times I'll get to walk home with you like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to walk home with Tomochika.[n]{f 1 1}
